somali.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Ku soo dhawoow Istuudiyaha Farshaxanka & Naqshadeynta!
somali.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Sahmi 15 qalab oo is-dhexgal ah oo bara aragtida midabka, farshaxanka xisaabta, naqshadeynta abuurista, iyo helitaanka aragga. Tab kastaa waa shiraac hal-abuur oo kala duwan. Waa kan waxa aad abuuri karto:
somali.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Sahmi booska midabka HSL si is-dhexgal ah
somali.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Isku dar rinjiga adigoo isticmaalaya aragtida midabka ka-jarista
somali.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Ku abuur farshaxan pixel ah shiraac shabag leh
somali.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Ku sawir isku-ekaansho wareeg iyo mid muraayadeed
somali.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Beeraha socodka, walxo yaryar, beerta xiddigaha, aurora
somali.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Rinjiyeyn wareeg oo kombiyuutar ah oo leh fiisikis
somali.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Naqshado xadhig oo joomatari ah oo musmaarro lagu sameeyay
somali.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Naqshado jiingad oo isku celcelinaya sida kuwa M.C. Escher
somali.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Naqshadee oo dhoofi naqshadaha gradient ee CSS
somali.harmony_desc: Sahmi isku-waafaqa muusigga, kala fogaanshaha codadka, iyo xiriirka ka dhexeeya codka iyo aragga
somali.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Aragtida midabka (isku-dar ku-dar iyo ka-jar, midabbo isku-dhammaystiraya, HSL/RGB), qalooca xisaabeed (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals iyo is-ekaanshaha, joomatariga jiingadaha, aragtida indhaha ee Op Art, heerarka helitaanka WCAG, iyo farshaxanka kombiyuutarka. Qalab kastaa wuxuu baraa xisaabta ka danbeysa quruxda.
somali.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 giraanta hareeraheeda), saturation (nadaafad), iftiin. Kuwa isku-dhammaystira way is-hor fadhiyaan, kuwa isku dhow way deriskaa, saddexdu waxay ku kala fog yihiin 120°. Newton wuxuu iftiinka giraanta saaray sanadkii 1666.
somali.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Rinjiga iyo daabacaadda = ka-jarid (CMY isku-darkoodu wuxuu noqonayaa madow); iftiinka iyo shaashadaha = ku-darid (RGB isku-darkoodu wuxuu noqonayaa caddaan. Isku adduun, laakiin xisaab gebi ahaanba kala duwan — daabacaha wuxuu ku fikiraa saxanka K, telefishanku wuxuu ku fikiraa Hz.
somali.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Farshaxanka Pixel — farsamada bitmap laga bilaabo 8×8 ilaa 32×32
somali.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Pixel kastaa waa go'aan ula kac ah. Sprites-ka NES waxaa lagu yaqaanaa in geesi lagu geliyo 16×16 iyadoo la isticmaalayo afar midab. Algorithm-ka xariiqda ee Bresenham wuxuu sawiraa xariiqyo dhinac ah iyada oo aan la isticmaalin tirooyin dhibco leh.
somali.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Labo-dhinac (muraayad), wareeg (n-laab), dhibic. 17-ka koox ee naqshadaha derbiga ayaa kala saara naqshad kasta oo 2D ah oo isku celcelinaysa — shaqada Escher oo dhan.
somali.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Goobaabin yar ayaa mid weyn gudaheeda ku giringirata, qalinkuna wuxuu ka fog yahay bartamaha. Saamiga labada raadiyas ayaa go'aaminaya tirada caleemaha ubaxa; fogaantuna waxay go'aaminaysaa dhumucda. Alaabtan ciyaarta ah waxaa la diiwaan geliyay 1965, laakiin xisaabteedu waxay ka timid 1700-meeyadii.
somali.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt wuxuu qoray tilmaamo; kii derbiga ka shaqeeyayna wuxuu ahaa fuliyaha. Maanta: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Farshaxanluhu waa xeerka, ma aha natiijada.”
somali.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Farshaxanka Wareegga — fiisikiska xoogga bartamaha u jiida ee rinjiga
somali.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Rinji ku dhufo, wareeji, oo daawo sida uu dibedda ugu firdhayo qaab wareegsan. Damien Hirst wuxuu malaayiin ka helay iibinta sawirrada wareegga. Isla fiisikiskii wareejiyaha salad; F = mω²r.
somali.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Farshaxanka Xadhigga — qalooc ka soo baxa xariiqyo toosan
somali.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Isku xir musmaar kasta oo n-aad ah; qalooc envelope ah ayaa soo baxaya. Mary Everest Boole ayaa tan u soo bandhigtay sidii xisaab fasal qiyaastii 1900. Cardioid-ka xariiqyada toosan weli aad buu u soo jiitaa.
somali.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Beeraha moiré ee Bridget Riley, shabagyada Vasarely. Unugyada cidhifka maskaxda ee dhaqdhaqaaqa ogaada ayaa xad-dhaaf u shaqeeya marka kala-duwanaanshuhu si dhakhso ah is-beddelo — bogguna wuxuu u muuqdaa mid *gariiraya*.
somali.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Jiingad kasta oo 2D ah oo isku celcelinaysa waxay ku dhacdaa mid ka mid ah 17-ka koox ee isku-ekaanshaha. Escher wuxuu tan ogaaday markuu Alhambra booqday 1936; kadibna wuxuu 30 sano ku bixiyay dhammaystirka liiskaas.
somali.fractal_self_similar_at_every_scale: Fractal — nafteeda u eg heer kasta
somali.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Kaballaash ubax leh, xeebaha, xididdada dhiigga, hillaaca, kiishashka hawada sambabbada — dhammaantood waa fractal. “Daruuruhu ma aha kubbado, buuruhuna ma aha koon, qolofta geedkuna ma aha mid siman.”
somali.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS wuxuu ku siinayaa gradient toosan, goobaabin, iyo conic. Qaanso-roobaadka dhabta ah wuxuu leeyahay iftiin sii socda (ma jiraan xariiqyo kala go'an) — “7-da midab ee qaanso-roobaadka” waxay ahayd doorasho Newton uu naftiisa u sameeyay sababo muusig awgood.
somali.stereogram_3d_from_a_flat_page: Stereogram — 3D oo ka yimid bog fidsan
somali.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Jacaylkii Magic Eye ee 90-meeyadii. Il kastaa waxay aragtaa nooc yar oo kala duwan; haddaad indhahaaga si sax ah isu dhaafiso ama u kala fogeyso, maskaxdaadu way isku darayaan si ay qoto u noqdaan. Qiyaastii 5% dadka runtii ma awoodaan — ma aha khaladkooda.
somali.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: qoraal caadi ah 4.5:1, mid weyn 3:1. Sababta kala-duwanaanshaha hooseeyaa u dhibo akhristayaasha aragga liita, xitaa haddii adigu akhrisan kartid. APCA (kii ku xigay WCAG 3.0) wuxuu isticmaalaa iftiinka dareenka, ma aha saamiga iftiinka ceyriin.
somali.harmony_lab_hint: Isbarbardhig kala fogaanshaha codadka ee isku waafaqsan iyo kuwa aan isku waafaqsanayn, ku xir saamiga soo noqnoqoshada naqshadda, oo u turjun xiriirka muusigga isku-waafaq arag ah.
somali.click_the_wheel_to_pick_a_hue: Riix giraanta si aad hue u doorato
somali.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: wuxuu naqshad ku celceliyaa dhibic dhexe hareeraheeda. Gudaha
somali.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , kalluunka xiddigta (5-laab), baraf-jajabka (6-laab), iyo ubaxyada waxay tan meel walba ka muujiyaan.
somali.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Naqshadaha jiingadaha, bustayaal tolan, mosaic dabaqa.
somali.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Baraf-jajab, guryaha shinnida, naqshado xiddig oo Islaami ah.
somali.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Farshaxanka mandala, daaqadaha ubaxa ee kaniisadaha waaweyn.
somali.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Farshaxanka joomatariga Islaamiga ah wuxuu si weyn u isticmaalaa isku-ekaanshaha goobaabinta. Guntimaha Celtic, maryaha Navajo, iyo calaamadaha qoysaska Jabbaan (“mon”) dhammaantood waxay ku tiirsan yihiin isku-ekaanshaha wareegga.
somali.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: wuxuu isticmaalaa isku-ekaansho labo-dhinac ah (muraayadeed) — nooca laga helo wejiyada, balanbaallista, iyo caleemaha. Waa isku-ekaanshaha ugu badan dunida xayawaanka.
somali.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: wuxuu ku wareegaa iftiinka midabka intaad sawiraysid, isagoo si toos ah u abuuraya saameyn mandala oo gradient u eg.
somali.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Dawacada bunni ee dheereysa waxay ka boodaysaa eeyga caajiska ah
somali.sculpt_loading: Waxaa la soo rarayaa mishiinka xardhidda…
somali.sculpt_failed: Xardhiddu way fashilantay — isku day sharraxaad ka fudud.
somali.sculpt_canvas: Muuqaalka horudhaca ah ee xardhka 3D. Jiid si aad u wareejiso.
somali.sculpt_presets: Ka bilow habayn horay loo diyaariyay
somali.sculpt_gallery_empty: Xardhyada la kaydiyay halkan ayay ka soo muuqan doonaan.
somali.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Kala-duwanaansho ugu sarreeya. Pop art, calaamadaha shirkadaha.
somali.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Dhalaalaya laakiin dheelitiran. Buugaagta carruurta, majaajillada.
somali.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Midabbo hodan ah oo leh laba lammaane oo is-ka soo horjeeda.
somali.calm_harmonious_landscape_painting: Degan, isku waafaqsan — sawirka muuqaalka dhulka.
somali.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Hagaaji hue aasaasiga ah, saturation, kala duwanaanshaha iftiinka, wareegga, iyo cabbirka midabbada. Qalabku wuxuu si toos ah u muujiyaa midabbo isku waafaqsan, wuxuuna u kala saaraa mid ka mid ah shanta nooc ee isku-waafaqa. Dhibco ma jiraan, jawaab la muujiyo ma jirto — kaliya isku day oo fiiri isku-darka kee uu keenayo isku-waafaqa kee.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Malo-awaal (qoraal xor ah — jawaab sax ah ma jirto): Maxaa ka dhigaya midabbo inay u dareemaan isku waafaqsan halkii ay ka noqon lahaayeen kuwo qalqal leh?
somali.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 Waad istaagtay — muuji su'aalo furan (jawaabo ma jiraan)
somali.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Su'aalo furan — baar adigoo wax beddelaya:
somali.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Hel midabbada ugu yar ee weli kuu dareemaya inay "dhammaystiran" yihiin.
somali.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Rinjiyeyaashii dhabta ahaa ee impressionist-ka waxay isticmaali jireen midabbo isku dhow. Maxay u ahayd sidaas?
somali.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Qaar ka mid ah habaynta midabku magacyo rasmi ah ayay leeyihiin (isku-dhammaystir, isku-dhammaystir kala qaybsan, saddexley). Raadi kuwaas oo isku day inaad dib u sameyso.
somali.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation sare + midabbo badan = qalqal. Isku day inaad saturation-ka ku yareyso sliderka isku-darka — maxaa ku dhacaya "isku-waafaqa"?
somali.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Waxaan filayaa inaan hadda fahmay isku-waafaqa midabka — aan erayadayda ku sharraxo
somali.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Erayadaada ku sharrax: sidee kala fogaanshaha hue, saturation, iyo cabbirka midabbadu u go'aamiyaan "isku-waafaqa"?
somali.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Xusuusin naqshadeyn: calaamad isku-waafaq oo shan xaaladood oo kala duwan leh; giraanta SVG waxay muujinaysaa booskooda; dhibco "midabbo wanaagsan" ma jiraan — si ula kac ah ayaa loo sameeyay.
somali.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — jidka ay raacdo dhibic ku taal goobaabin yar oo mid weyn gudaheeda ku giringirata. Naqshaddu waxay ku xiran tahay
somali.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (qeybiyaha guud ee ugu weyn) labada raadiyas. Marka R/r uu yahay jajab fudud, waxaad helaysaa caleemo yar; saamiyada adagna waxay abuuraan jidad isku dhafan oo aan waligood is-celcelin.
somali.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Riix ama jiid shiraaca si aad u abuurto qaraxyo walxo ah
somali.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Riix oo jiid si aad rinji ugu dhibcayso shiraaca wareegaya
somali.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: Nidaam wareegaya gudihiisa, walxuhu waxay dareemaan xoog been ah oo dibedda u riixaya oo la mid ah masaafada ay bartamaha uga fog yihiin iyo laba-jibbaarka xawaaraha xagasha (ω²r).
somali.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Farshaxanka wareegga ee dhabta ahi wuxuu isticmaalaa xawaare-kordhinta bartamaha u jeedda si uu rinjiga u faafiyo. Rinjiga khafiifka ah si dhakhso ah ayuu dibedda ugu duulaa; rinjiga culuska ahna wuxuu sameeyaa raadad gaagaaban oo la xakameyn karo.
somali.why_it_s_beautiful: Sababta uu u qurux badan yahay:
somali.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Isku-darka dhaqdhaqaaqa wareegga iyo culeyska rinjiga ayaa abuuraya wareego dabiici ah iyo naqshado isdhexgal ah. Laba sawir oo wareeg ah weligood isku mid ma noqdaan — waa nooc ka mid ah
somali.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: isagoo ka soo saaraya xariiqyo toosan. Goobaabin iyo ku-dhufasho 2, waxaad helaysaa
somali.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — qalooca qaab wadne leh ee lagu arko koobabka qaxwaha. Ku-dhufasho 3-na waxay sameysaa
somali.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Ku-dhufashooyinka sare waxay abuuraan naqshado isku dhafan oo
somali.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: maamusho: musmaar N wuxuu ku xirmaa musmaar (N × M) mod wadarta.
somali.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Farshaxanka Aragga) wuxuu soo baxay 1960-meeyadii, kuwii hormuudka u ahaana waxay ahaayeen
somali.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Wuxuu isticmaalaa sida aragga bini'aadamku u shaqeeyo si uu u abuuro khiyaamo dhaqdhaqaaq, gariir, iyo qoto ah dusha fidsan.
somali.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: waxay soo baxaan marka laba shabag oo caadi ah ay ku dul dhacaan xagal yar. Maskaxdaadu ma xallin karto naqshadaha isku dhacaya, sidaas darteedna waxay abuurtaa qalooc iyo hirar been ah. Isla saameyntan ayaa keenta dhalaalka “albaabka shabaggga” ee dharka qaarkood.
somali.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: waxay dhacaan marka midabbo isku-dhammaystiraya oo saturation sare leh ay dhinac wada fadhiyaan. Qaataha midabka ee ishaadu way tartamaan, waxayna abuuraan cidhif guuxaya oo aan degganeyn — tan waxaa la yiraahdaa
somali.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: ee ku jira retina-da ayaa ah habka ugu weyn ee dareenka. Naqshadaha giraamada isku bartame ah waxay kiciyaan boodbood indhood oo aan la doonaynin, taasoo ka dhigaysa farshaxanka mid neefsanaya oo garaacaya.
somali.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (ama jiingad-fidin) waxay dabooshaa bannaan iyadoo isticmaalaysa qaabab isku haga oo aan lahayn dalool ama isdulsaar. Kaliya saddex qaab caadi ah ayaa keligood fidin kara:
somali.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) wuxuu jiingado fudud u beddelay farshaxan isagoo qalloociyay cidhifyada jiingadaha. Farsamadiisu waxay ahayd: qallooci dhinac ka mid ah qaabka kadibna nuqul u sameey qalloocintaas dhinaca ka soo horjeeda, si jiingaduhu weli si sax ah isugu hagaan. Tanina waa aasaaska
somali.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: si weyn ayuu u isticmaalaa jiingadaha — wuxuu isku daraa xiddigo, lixagallo, iyo naqshado isku xiran oo lagu arko masaajidyada sida Alhambra. Naqshadahaasi waxay raacaan xeerar xisaabeed adag iyagoo abuuraya isku-dhafnaan arag oo la yaab leh.
somali.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Jiingaduhu waxay isticmaalaan saddex hawlood oo muhiim ah —
somali.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (rogid). Jiingad kasta waxaa lagu kala saari karaa midkee ka mid ah '17-ka koox ee naqshadaha derbiga' uu ku jiro.
somali.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 Riix jiingadaha si aad midabbadooda u beddesho
somali.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: waxaa la abuuraa iyadoo la celcelinayo z = z² + c dhibic kasta oo c ah ee ku jirta bannaanka tirooyinka isku dhafan. Dhibcaha halkaas oo |z| uu xad ku sii jiro (uusan 2 ka badnayn) waxay ku jiraan 'gudaha' xirmada. Xuduudkeedu wuxuu muujiyaa
somali.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: waxay isticmaalaan isla qaacido, laakiin c way hagaajiyaan oo z-ga bilowga ah way beddelaan. Dhibic kasta oo Mandelbrot ah waxay abuurtaa xirmo Julia oo gaar ah — dhibcaha Mandelbrot gudihiisa ku jira waxay abuuraan Julia isku xiran; kuwa dibadda ku jirana waxay abuuraan 'xirmooyin Fatou' oo boodh u eg.
somali.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: wuxuu celcelinta u beddelaa z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, isagoo abuuraya qaab aan simanayn oo u eg markab dab qabsaday. Waxaa helay Michael Michelitsch iyo Otto Rössler 1992.
somali.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: waxaa lagu dhisaa 'ciyaarta qasnaanta': dooro dhibic aan la sii ogeyn, kadibna si joogto ah u bood badhtanka jidka ilaa gees si aan la sii ogeyn loo doortay. Wax la yaab leh, hab-socodkan aan la sii ogeyn wuxuu abuuraa fractal si buuxda naftiisa u eg.
somali.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) wuxuu abuuray erayga 'fractal' isagoo ka soo qaatay Laatiinka 'fractus' (jaban). Wuxuu muujiyay in xeebaha, buuraha, xididdada dhiigga, iyo suuqyada saamiyada ay dhammaantood muujiyaan joomatari fractal ah —
somali.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Laba jeer riix si aad u weyneyso • Giraanta wareejinta si aad u weyneyso ama u yareyso
somali.screens_create_gradients_by_mixing: 🌈 Shaashaduhu waxay abuuraan gradient iyagoo isku daraya
somali.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Pixel kastaa wuxuu isku daraa iftiin cas, cagaar, iyo buluug heerar kala duwan. Gradient wuxuu qiyamkaas si siman ugu beddelaa bannaanka.
somali.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: waxay soo saartaa gradient indhaha u siman kuwa RGB. Ka gudubka casaan ilaa buluug ee RGB wuxuu marayaa cawl dhoobo ah; HSL-na wuxuu marayaa guduud dhalaalaya — sida rinjiyeyaha ay isugu dari lahaayeen.
somali.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: meel walba wuu ka jiraa: qorrax-dhaca (kala firdhinta Rayleigh waxay kala saartaa dhererka hirarka iftiinka), qaanso-roobaadka (leexinta iftiinka waxay ku kala saartaa soo noqnoqoshada), iyo qotada badda (biyuhu marka hore way nuugaan casaanka, waxaana hara buluug qoto dheer).
somali.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: wuxuu midabka ku wareejiyaa dhibic dhexe hareeraheeda sida giraanta midabka. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa jaantusyada goobaabinta, giraamada soo-rarista, iyo bandhigga xogta. CSS wuxuu taageerada conic-gradient ku daray 2020 oo keliya!
somali.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: waxay gradient u isticmaalaan inay abuuraan qoto, u hagaan fiiro, ana kiciyaan dareen. Gradient laga bilaabo diirran ilaa qabow wuxuu tilmaamayaa qoto (aragtida hawada); iftiin ilaa madowna wuxuu tilmaamayaa mug (chiaroscuro).
somali.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Sharrax shay khariidad qoto ah ama qaab dusha ah oo naqshad ah...
somali.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Caddaan = hore u soo baxaya • Cawl = dhexe • Madow = fog
somali.your_eyes_are_6_cm_apart: Indhahaagu waxay ku kala fog yihiin qiyaastii 6 cm
somali.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , sidaas darteed mid kastaa wuxuu adduunka ka arkaa xagal yar oo kala duwan. Maskaxdaadu waxay labadan aragti isku daraysaa si aad u dareento
somali.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (sawirrada Magic Eye™) waxay qaabab 3D ku qariyaan naqshad isku celcelinaysa. Tabta: halka shayga qarsoon uu 'dhow' yahay, naqshaddu waxay ku celcelisaa
somali.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; halka uu 'fog' yahayna muddadu way dheer tahay. Maskaxdaadu waxay kala duwanaanshaha muddooyinkaas u tarjumaysaa qoto.
somali.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) ee Tom Baccei iyo Cheri Smith waxay adduunka ka iibiyeen in ka badan 25 milyan oo nuqul. Farsamada aasaasiga ah ee autostereogram waxaa hormuud u ahaa Dr. Christopher Tyler 1979.
somali.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Si aad sawirka u aragto: wejigaaga u soo dhoweey shaashadda, indhahaaga debeci sidii adigoo 'ka gudbaya' sawirka oo eegaya derbi fog, kadibna si tartiib ah dib ugu noqo. Qaabka 3D ayaa soo bixi doona. Tan waxaa la yiraahdaa
somali.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: waxay ku adag tahay inay arkaan stereogram-yada sababo la xiriira xaalado sida amblyopia (isha caajiska ah), strabismus (indho leexsan), ama kala duwanaansho kale oo aragga labada il. Tani waa arrin caadi ah!
somali.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Indhahaaga debeci oo 'ka gudub' sawirka si aad u aragto 3D
somali.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Indhahaaga debeci — isku day inaad 'ka gudubto' sawirka oo aad eegto derbiga ka danbeeya
somali.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Si tartiib ah dib ugu noqo. Qaab 3D ah ayaa soo bixi doona!
somali.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Talo: labada dhibcood ee hagaha ah ee kor ku yaal waa inay u muuqdaan saddex marka indhahaagu si sax ah u toosaan
somali.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Ka abuur stereogram 3D oo dhaqaaqaya habaynta horay loo diyaariyay, sawirradaada, sawirro aad soo shubtay, beddello, ama khariidado qoto oo AI abuurtay!
somali.draw_depth_keyframes: ✏️ Sawir Fareemyada Muhiimka ah ee Qotada
somali.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Sawir khariidad qoto, u qabo sida fareem muhiim ah, kadibna sawir midda xigta. Dhaqdhaqaaqu wuxuu isku xiri doonaa.
somali.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Soo shub sawir cawlan (caddaan = dhow, madow = fog). Waxaa lagu dhaqaajin doonaa beddelka aad dooratay.
somali.depth_map_loaded_400_400: ✅ Khariidadda qotada waa la soo shubay (400×400)
somali.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Waxay dhaqaajisaa khariidadda qotada ee tabka Taagan iyadoo isticmaalaysa saameynta beddelka ee la doortay. Marka hore u gudub habka Taagan si aad u sawirto khariidaddaada qotada.
somali.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Talo: Marka hore ku sawir khariidad qoto tabka Taagan, kadibna halkan ku soo noqo si aad beddel ugu dhaqaajiso.
somali.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Sharrax muuqaal 3D ah, AI-gana wuxuu abuuri doonaa khariidad qoto, kadibna wuxuu beddel ku dhaqaajin doonaa.
somali.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: tusaale ahaan Kubbad kiristaal ah oo dhalaalaysa oo hawada sare ku sabbaysa...
somali.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: AI ku abuur Khariidad Qoto oo Dhaqdhaqaaq ah
somali.ai_depth_map_ready: ✅ Khariidadda qotada ee AI way diyaar tahay!
somali.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Dhaqdhaqaaqa AI wuxuu u yeeraa Gemini si uu u qorsheeyo jagooyinka, kadibna Imagen si uu fareem kasta ugu sawiro khariidad qoto u gaar ah. Qiyaastii 5–7 ilbiriqsi fareemkiiba; xadka isticmaalka ma dhaafo.
somali.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Abuurista sawirka ee AI lama heli karo. Beddelkeeda isticmaal habka Diyaarin, Sawir, Soo shub, ama Beddel.
somali.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Indhahaaga debeci oo 'ka gudub' dhaqdhaqaaqa si aad u aragto qaabab 3D oo dhaqaaqaya
somali.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Indhahaaga ku xir muuqaalka 3D ka hor intaadan riixin Ciyaar
somali.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Xawaaraha hooseeya (4–6 FPS) way ka fudud yihiin in fiiro la haysto
somali.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Diyaarinta Garaaca iyo Wadnaha ayaa ugu fudud in la arko iyagoo dhaqaaqaya
somali.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: GIF-ka la dhoofiyay waxaa lagu daabici karaa fareem-fareem sida buug la rogrogo!
